title.en: After the construction of the Truncated Yellow ...

content.en:
After the construction of the Truncated Yellow Building was completed, under the guidance of Ye Tian, Han Xuan officially joined the Nine-Story Building and settled in the Truncated Yellow Building.

In addition, there were also a number of official members of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor level and the official members of the Half-Step Eightfold Origin Ancestor level who were transferred from other branches of the Ninth Story Building to the Truncated Yellow Building.

There are even three Eightfold Ancestors who are also sitting in this Yellow Tower, and one of them is Ye Tian.

Ye Tian was originally a member of the Truncated District Boundary, so the Nine-Story Building directly let him sit here, but he was still a member of the Guquan Xuanlou.

In the Silent Black Sea, it was not only the Nine-Story Building that was eyeing the Truncation Boundary, but several other great forces were also eyeing it, sending Dao Ancestors to build a stronghold here.

However, there is no value here at the moment, so there will be no conflict between the major powers.

But for those half-step sevenfold ancestors, the next few years of cutting off the district boundary continued to give birth to the community boundary and many resource treasures, allowing them to continue to obtain resources and improve their strength rapidly.

In a short period of time, many half-step sevenfold ancestors were born in the truncated area boundary, and even local sevenfold ancestors were born.

For example, the Xuanqing Dao Ancestor from the Tongtian Origin Domain Realm, after gaining many opportunities, has now stepped into the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm in one go.

However, what Xuanqing Dao Ancestor comprehended was only the Eightfold Primordial Ancestor, and his life level was also very low, so even if he became a Sevenfold Ancestor, his own combat power was still far inferior to the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor of the Nine-Fold Building.

Of course, Xuanqing Dao Ancestor himself was already very satisfied.

Becoming a Sevenfold Ancestor, his strength is far beyond the previous one, and he even has the hope of becoming a half-step Eightfold Ancestor in the future.

It's just that as more and more Dao Ancestors cut off the boundaries of the region, his position is a little embarrassing, and the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor is a little inadequate.

......

"The cultivation of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor is too difficult, it has consumed countless resources, and the cultivation is still in the early stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, and it doesn't even feel like there is any improvement!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He also knew that it was not easy for the Eightfold Origin Ancestor to improve his cultivation, and there were many Eightfold Origin Ancestors in the Nine-Fold Building, and they were only in the early stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, and they were not very short of resources!

Therefore, if you want to improve the cultivation of the Eightfold Ancestor, you not only need a huge amount of resources, but also endless time!

And if the Eightfold Ancestor wants to improve his strength, he doesn't just have to improve his cultivation.

The Eightfold Ancestor can break the shackles of the Extreme Yuan Dao and comprehend a higher level of Dao, which is called the Immeasurable Dao!

One yuan is the beginning, and the immeasurable is the end!

On the Silent Black Sea, the Infinite Dao is also known as the most terrifying Dao, which is the sublimation and transformation of the Yuan Dao.

However, countless Eightfold Origin Ancestors did not comprehend the Infinite Dao in the end, and even some of the Eightfold Origin Ancestors cultivated to the peak realm of the Eightfold Origin Ancestors, and their own Dao was still the Yuan Dao, and they did not comprehend the Infinite Dao.

But once you comprehend the Immeasurable Dao in the Eightfold Origin Ancestor Realm, you will be almost invincible.

The Infinite Path is difficult to comprehend, and even many Eightfold Origin Ancestors can't touch the threshold, but the Ninefold Origin Ancestors are able to comprehend the Infinite Path.

Even a half-step ninefold ancestor, if he stayed in this realm for a long time, even if his comprehension was poor, he would be able to comprehend the immeasurable path.

"If I comprehend the Immeasurable Dao, even if my cultivation is still in the early stage of the Eightfold Ancestor, my strength will be transformed!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Moreover, after comprehending the Infinite Dao, he can also create the Infinite Dao Control Technique that surpasses the Supreme Yuan Dao Control Technique, and the strength he exerts continues to skyrocket.

"I don't know anything about the Immeasurable Dao, I only know one name at the moment, and I have to listen to the sermons of the Ninefold Ancestor!"

Ye Tian inquired a little and learned that the Nine-Fold Building did have a sermon on the Immeasurable Dao, but it needed to be booked, and it would take a long time for a Ninefold Ancestor to explain the Immeasurable Dao.

"Hey, Nine Fox Dao Ancestor, after the six and three billion years of the original domain era, I will speak the immeasurable Dao, 20,000 points to listen to the lecture once, make an appointment!"

Ye Tian spent 20,000 points to make an appointment for the preaching of the Nine Fox Dao Ancestor.

20,000 points is nothing to him now, and he can easily take it out.

......

In the blink of an eye, more than six billion years have passed!

On this day, the Nine Fox Dao Ancestor preached in a special time and space in the Nine Buildings Building, and many official members who signed up could go to listen to the sermon.

And after Ye Tian got the news, he also came to this special time and space for the first time.

"So many Dao Ancestors are here!"

Ye Tian looked around and found that tens of thousands of Dao Ancestors had gathered here, and there were also Dao Ancestors coming.

In the end, the number of Dao Ancestors who listened this time reached more than 60,000.

Most of them are Eightfold Ancestors, and there are a few half-step Ninefold Ancestors.

As for the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, naturally there is none, after all, when they reach the Ninefold Origin Ancestor realm, they have comprehended the Immeasurable Dao, so it is naturally impossible to deign to listen to the Nine Fox Dao Ancestor's preaching.

Even if the Nine Ancestors communicated with each other, it would not be possible to be here.

"There are more than 60,000 Dao Ancestors, each Dao Ancestor pays at least 20,000 points, just this time to preach, this Nine Fox Dao Ancestor can earn 1.2 billion points!"

1.2 billion points is also an unimaginable wealth for Ye Tian!

The point is that the points of the nine-story building are difficult to obtain, and they basically rely on doing tasks.

Although the Eightfold Ancestor earned a lot of points for the tasks he did, how could he have thought that the Nine Fox Dao Ancestor would earn it by preaching so casually!

It has to be said that the stronger the strength, the easier it is to obtain wealth resources.

Not long after, the Nine Fox Dao Ancestor came.

"The Nine Fox Dao Ancestor is a strong man in the late stage of the Nine Primordial Ancestors, a member of the Heavenly Tower, and his strength is about the same as that of the Arhat Dao Ancestor!"

Information about this Nine Fox Dao Ancestor came to Ye Tian's mind.

Moreover, the Nine Fox Dao Ancestor is also a female Dao Ancestor.

After the Nine Fox Dao Ancestor came, he didn't talk nonsense, and began to preach after a few simple words.

Airplanes!!!!

The Nine Fox Dao Ancestors' own immeasurable Dao aura enveloped the audience, making more than 60,000 Dao Ancestors fall into the immeasurable Dao rhyme.

Under such circumstances, the preaching of the Nine Fox Dao Ancestors was easier for many Dao Ancestors to understand.

Ye Tian listened carefully to the content of the Nine Fox Dao Ancestor's sermons, and gradually gained some understanding of the Immeasurable Dao.

Gradually, hundreds of thousands of years of the Primordial Era passed.

And after the Nine Fox Dao Ancestor preached for so long, he left directly, which meant that this sermon was over.

And one Dao Ancestor did not leave here, but continued to understand the mystery of the immeasurable Dao.

I don't know how long it has been, but a Dao Ancestor at the peak of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor sighed: "Hey, the Infinite Dao is too difficult to comprehend, I always feel that I have touched a little threshold, but it still can't work." If the Nine Fox Dao Ancestor had been preaching for me, I would definitely have been able to comprehend the Immeasurable Dao in the Eightfold Origin Ancestor realm!"

At this time, another Eightfold Origin Ancestor said sarcastically: "Giant Cloud Dao Ancestor, do you still want the Nine Fox Dao Ancestor to preach for you all the time? Hehe, how can such an existence as the Nine Fox Dao Ancestor have that kind of kung fu!"

The Dao Ancestor named Juyun didn't say much and quickly left.

And Ye Tian also left here and returned to the Truncated Yellow Building.

At this time.

He already had a direction for the immeasurable path in his heart.
